Tilda:
completion: The child does not enter formal education until it is 7. So before 7 you are learning how to climb trees, you are learning how to light fires. You are learning how to make friends. And they pay us back in cow dung and milk. It's a business relationship. They take the cows, it's on a loan which is paid back usually over two years.
